# Psalms 115

## Verses (18)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Not to us, O Lord, not to us, but to your name let glory be given, because of your mercy and your unchanging faith. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Why may the nations say, Where is now their God? | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | But our God is in heaven: he has done whatever was pleasing to him. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Their images are silver and gold, the work of men's hands. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | They have mouths, but no voice; they have eyes, but they see not; | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | They have ears, but no hearing; they have noses, but no sense of smell; | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | They have hands without feeling, and feet without power of walking; and no sound comes from their throat. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Those who make them are like them; and so is everyone who puts his faith in them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | O Israel, have faith in the Lord: he is their help and their breastplate. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | O house of Aaron, have faith in the Lord: he is their help and their breastplate. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | You worshippers of the Lord, have faith in the Lord: he is their help and their breastplate. | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | The Lord has kept us in mind and will give us his blessing; he will send blessings on the house of Israel and on the house of Aaron. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | He will send blessings on the worshippers of the Lord, on the small and on the great. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | May the Lord give you and your children still greater increase. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | May you have the blessing of the Lord, who made heaven and earth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | The heavens are the Lord's; but the earth he has given to the children of men. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | The dead do not give praise to the Lord; or those who go down to the underworld. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | But we will give praise to the Lord now and for ever. Praise be to the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
